headline: Owner & Operator at Ward Taxi & Car Service LLC | Deacon, Grace Community Church
summary: Small-business owner running Ward Taxi & Car Service LLC, a 12-vehicle taxi and car-service fleet serving Allapattah, Miami International Airport, and hospital and hotel contracts since 2000. Currently pursuing AHCA non-emergency medical transport licensing to expand patient transportation services. Deacon at Grace Community Church and proud to serve the Allapattah community.
